summary: A rectangular stable or ranch building with a flat roof, featuring two prominent brick chimneys at each end, white fence railings along the perimeter, and a central interior courtyard with green grass and crop rows. The structure has horizontal striping of brick and stone materials with decorative white pillar supports.

shape.symmetry: bilateral symmetry along length axis; two matching chimneys at ends

elements: two tall brick chimneys with stepped caps
horizontal brick and stone striping on walls
central open courtyard with grass floor
white pillar supports between fence sections
flat roof with dark material edging
rebuild_hints: Build rectangular outer walls with alternating brick and stonebrick horizontal stripes
Leave central courtyard area open (approximately 10x12 blocks)
Place white fence posts at regular intervals around perimeter, approximately every 2 blocks
Construct two identical tall chimneys (approximately 4-5 blocks tall) at north and south ends
Add stepped/tiered caps to chimney tops using dark materials
Create flat roof using dark slabs with lighter trim edges
Fill courtyard floor with grass blocks and plant crop rows diagonally
Ensure bilateral symmetry along the length axis
Add white pillar/post supports between fence sections for structural appearance
uncertainties: Exact interior courtyard dimensions uncertain from exterior views alone
Precise roof material composition (appears to be dark slabs with wood beams)
Whether interior has stalls or divisions not visible from exterior
Exact height of chimneys relative to main structure (estimated 4-5 blocks above roof)
Specific arrangement of crop rows in courtyard (appears diagonal but exact pattern unclear)
Whether the structure has interior walls or is completely open courtyard
